title: AI actors and writers not eligible for Oscars: The Academy
description: The Academy has ruled that AI-generated actors and screenplays will not qualify for Oscars, making human performance and authorship mandatory. The new rules come amid growing use of artificial intelligence in filmmaking and days after an AI version of Val Kilmer was unveiled.
content:
Actors created with artificial intelligence will not be eligible for an Oscar, the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences said Friday as it launched a crackdown on the use of AI.
Academy says AI actors, writers not eligible for Oscars

title: Half of teenage girls in survey use AI for advice
description: More than half of teenage girls in Japan who use generative artificial intelligence solicit AI's advice on personal worries, a recent government survey found, highlighting the technology's growing role among young women. title: Meta chief Zuckerberg doubles down on AI spending
description: Meta chief Mark Zuckerberg this week defended massive spending on artificial intelligence that dragged down shares despite strong earnings boosted by the technology. title: Dueling PACs with similar names, one with AI ties, pouring money into Ohio congressional race
description: Jobs and Democracy PAC, funded by artificial intelligence industry figures, is backing Brook Park Democrat Brian Poindexter in Tuesday's 7th District congressional primary.

title: US signs deals with 7 tech companies to use AI in classified military systems
description: WASHINGTON — The Pentagon said Friday that it has reached deals with seven tech companies to use their artificial intelligence in its classified computer networks, allowing the military to tap into AI-powered capabilities to help it fight wars.
